name: Ovo-lacto: Asparagus/Mushroom Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Cook the rice according to package instructions.
3. Mix the cooked rice with everything except the cheese (garlic, onions, mushrooms, asparagus, cashews or sunflower seeds, eggs, black pepper, and marjoram).
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 8-inch by 8-inch baking pan.
5. Sprinkle the grated mozzarella cheese on top.
6. Bake for 40 minutes.
